data.title: FangDD issues $34.32M convertible note; to purchase assets and issue Class C shares.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on October 24, 2025, Fangdd Network Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: DUO) revealed it has engaged in a convertible note purchase agreement. Fangdd, a prominent property technology firm in China, disclosed issuing a convertible promissory note valuing US$34,320,000 to an investor via private placement.

data.title: AlarMax promotes Matt Ehrman to Senior VP, Supply Chain in Pittsburgh on Oct. 24, 2025, showing commitment to supply chain growth.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, AlarMax has promoted Matt Ehrman to Senior Vice President of Supply Chain. This move underscores the company's dedication to enhancing its supply chain infrastructure for its dealers, branches, and vendor partners.

data.title: Connectbase wins "Best Data Service Innovation" at Global Connectivity Awards 2025. Hosted by Capacity Media.
data.description: In Boston on October 24, 2025, Connectbase, the Operating System for Connected Commerce, revealed that it secured the title of "Best Data Service Innovation" at the 2025 Global Connectivity Awards, organized by Capacity Media. This accolade highlights Connectbase's innovative approach in the field of data services.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts acquires new site in Cincinnati, marking expansion of Flying Ace Express Car Wash brand.
data.description: In Columbus and Cincinnati on October 24, 2025, Express Wash Concepts (EWC) declared the ongoing growth of its Flying Ace Express Car Wash brand by acquiring a new site. EWC is known as one of the rapidly expanding express car wash operators in the country. The specific location of the new site was not provided in the information.

data.title: XData Group and ComplyControl sponsor AWS Community Day Georgia 2025, uniting cloud professionals, developers, and IT enthusiasts.
data.description: In Tallinn, Estonia on October 24, 2025, XData Group and ComplyControl were honored to sponsor the AWS Community Day Georgia 2025. This significant event united cloud technology experts, developers, and IT enthusiasts for an opportunity to exchange knowledge and foster deeper connections in the industry.

data.title: Fidelity Investments adds Solana (SOL) to its digital assets lineup, enabling U.S. clients to trade and store the cryptocurrency.
data.description: Fidelity Investments has recently expanded its digital asset offerings to include Solana (SOL), providing U.S. brokerage customers access to custody and trading services for this cryptocurrency. This move showcases the company's commitment to catering to the growing demand for digital assets among investors.

data.title: CPI inflation data released for new vehicle prices unaffected by Trump tariffs; Fed rate cuts in question.
data.description: The increase in prices of new vehicles has not been impacted by the tariffs implemented by President Trump so far. It is uncertain if the inflation rate will be affected as the Consumer Price Index (CPI) data is scheduled for release. Analysts are analyzing if the tariffs imposed by Trump will hinder the Federal Reserve from implementing further interest rate cuts.

data.title: Marvion Inc. sees revenue surge over 100%, starts building new warehouses in Hong Kong. Financial stats revealed.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 24, 2025, Marvion Inc. (OTCQB: MVNC), a company with holdings in logistics, warehousing, and consulting services, released unaudited financial data for the first half of 2025. Key figures revealed during this period included...

data.title: Concours D'Elegance Texas launching luxury lifestyle community on Lake Travis, aiming to set new standards in elite living.
data.description: Announcement: Concours D'Elegance Texas has officially launched its private mixed-use lifestyle community on Lake Travis in Austin, Texas. This unique project allows ownership to be utilized as a live-work development, setting a new standard for elite collectors, enthusiasts, and entrepreneurs. The exclusive enclave aims to be the premier luxury lifestyle destination in Texas, offering unparalleled opportunities for residents. The project promises to surpass current expectations and redefine upscale living in the state.

data.title: General Dynamics beats Q3 2025 expectations with $12.907B revenue, $3.88 EPS, and $1.3B operating earnings.
data.description: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) exceeded Wall Street expectations in the third quarter of 2025, leading to a surge in stock prices. The aerospace and defense company reported total revenue of $12.907 billion, showing a 10.6% increase from the previous year and surpassing the projected $12.566 billion. Diluted GAAP earnings per share (EPS) stood at $3.88, surpassing the estimated $3.69 and reflecting a 15.8% increase year-over-year. Operating earnings reached $1.3 billion, resulting in an operating margin of 10.3%, up by 20 basis points from the previous year. This strong performance was driven by robust operational results in all segments. Furthermore, the company experienced strong order activity that contributed to a growing backlog.

data.title: Uber and WeRide start offering autonomous Robotaxi rides in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia - a new milestone in AV technology.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, WeRide (NASDAQ: WRD) and Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) have launched autonomous Robotaxi passenger services. This marks the debut of autonomous vehicles on the Uber platform in Saudi Arabia, a significant step in Uber's collaboration with the Transport General Authority (TGA) to support the Kingdom's Vision 2030. Vision 2030 aims to position Saudi Arabia as a leader in technology and innovation. The partnership signifies a key milestone in providing cutting-edge transportation options to the public in Riyadh.
